FBS-001.reason: Funding/basis stress remains observable, but requires stricter derivatives facts before any promotion.

MPG-001.reason: First bounded-aggressive live-order pilot lane; use Owner-allocated subaccount profile; no expansion of symbol, side, notional, leverage, or max exposure beyond the selected profile.

PMR-001.reason: Precious-metal overlay remains observe-only until role/session/mark facts are consistently ready.

SOR-001.reason: Session-window observer; armed only inside its session/structure conditions.

TEQ-001.reason: Equity-like perpetual momentum may prepare candidate evidence, but should not compete with the first MPG real-order closure.

BTPC-001.reason: Passed main-control L2 intake dry-run; may prepare non-executing shadow-candidate evidence only and remains outside L4 real-order scope.

legacy_compatibility_notes.tiny_real_order_eligible: Legacy mode label retained for compatibility; it means allocated-subaccount bounded-aggressive real-order eligibility, not an instruction to reduce risk.
legacy_compatibility_notes.superseded_boundary_name: The former tiny-boundary wording is retired. Current authority is allocated_subaccount_profile_boundary.

new_strategy_group_defaults.promotion_rule: New StrategyGroups may move from L1 to L2 only after reviewed handoff intake and dry-run audit. They must not enter L4 until the first MPG allocated-subaccount real-order loop has closed or the Owner explicitly changes the selected live lane.

L0.meaning: Visible in the StrategyGroup catalog only; no runtime observation.
L0.name: catalog_only

L1.meaning: May record read-only observations and no-action evidence only.
L1.name: observe_only

L2.meaning: May prepare non-executing shadow candidate and authorization evidence after fresh signal and facts pass.
L2.name: shadow_candidate

L3.meaning: May run armed observation and action-time rehearsal, but cannot place a real order unless separately promoted to L4.
L3.name: armed_observation

L4.meaning: May place an allocated-subaccount bounded-aggressive real order after selected scope, fresh signal, RequiredFacts, candidate/auth, action-time FinalGate, and official Operation Layer all pass. The legacy mode name is not a de-risking instruction.
L4.name: tiny_real_order_eligible
